Gene Set Enrichment analysis part III: snRNAseq samples with metformin induced cardiac microtissue

Adapted from Gino Bonazza DCM samples analysis by Magdalena Czepiec and Maks Necki

Magdalena Czepiec
Department of Clinical Immunology / Jagiellonian University
GitHub


Maks Necki
Department of Clinical Immunology / Jagiellonian University
GitHub


1 Introduction

A module score represents a quantitative metric that summarizes the coordinated expression of a predefined gene set (e.g., genes associated with metabolism, stress response, or signaling pathways) into a single value for each cell or sample. It is computed by aggregating the expression levels of genes within a given biological category—often with normalization against control gene sets—thereby providing an integrated measure of pathway or process activity rather than relying on individual gene-level signals. This approach enables: - comparative assessment of pathway activity across cells, experimental conditions, or clusters, - identification of cellular subpopulations characterized by differential activation of specific biological processes, - reduction of data dimensionality, facilitating the interpretation of complex transcriptomic datasets.

1.1 Setup: Libraries and Environement

  # ---- Package lists ----
  cran_packages <- c(
  "dplyr",
  "ggplot2",
  "patchwork",
  "htmltools",
  "tidyr",
  "Seurat",
  "stringr",
  "plotly",
  "kableExtra",
  "knitr",
  "sessioninfo"
  )

  bioc_packages <- c(
  "clusterProfiler",
  "org.Hs.eg.db",
  "enrichplot",
  "ReactomePA"
  )

  # ---- Function to install & load ----
  install_and_load <- function(pkg, bioc = FALSE) {
  if (!requireNamespace(pkg, quietly = TRUE)) {
    if (bioc) {
      if (!requireNamespace("BiocManager", quietly = TRUE)) {
        install.packages("BiocManager")
      }
      BiocManager::install(pkg, ask = FALSE, update = FALSE)
    } else {
      install.packages(pkg)
    }
  }
  library(pkg, character.only = TRUE)
  }

  # ---- Install & load CRAN packages ----
  invisible(lapply(cran_packages, install_and_load))

  # ---- Install & load Bioconductor packages ----
  invisible(lapply(bioc_packages, install_and_load, bioc = TRUE))

  cat("ALL PACKAGES SUCCESSFULLY LOADED")
## ALL PACKAGES SUCCESSFULLY LOADED

1.2 Helper function for importing extraction datasets without predefined gene lists (no genes after GSEA part II)

  safe_read_csv <- function(path) {
  if (!file.exists(path)) {
    message("No file found (likely no genes / empty result): ", path)
    return(NULL)
  }

  df <- tryCatch(
    read.csv(path),
    error = function(e) NULL
  )

  if (is.null(df) || nrow(df) == 0) {
    message("File is empty or invalid: ", path)
    return(NULL)
  }

  return(df)
  }

1.3 Importing files after extraction (GSEA part II)

# ---- Metabolism ----
score_mettgf_tgf_metabolism <- safe_read_csv("C:/Users/magda/Desktop/Lib_11_MTs_GSEA/Skrypty do publikacji/GSEA part II (Gene Extraction)/Cardiomyocytes/results_cardio_extraction_metabolism/mettgf_vs_tgf_Metabolism.csv")

1.4 Importing Seurat object containing analyzed and processed cardioblast cells from all conditions

Cardio <- readRDS("C:/Users/magda/Desktop/Lib_11_MTs_GSEA/Skrypty do publikacji/GSEA part III (Category Score)/Cardio.rds")

2 Computing module scores for each biological category

  # ---- Genes within metabolic category ----
  genes_tgf_nc_metabolism <- unique(as.character(score_tgf_nc_metabolism$x))
  genes_mettgf_tgf_metabolism <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_metabolism$x))
  genes_met_nc_metabolism <- unique(as.character(score_met_nc_metabolism$x))

  genes_all_metabolism <- unique(c(
  genes_met_nc_metabolism,
  genes_mettgf_tgf_metabolism,
  genes_tgf_nc_metabolism
  ))

  genes_intersect_list_metabolism <- intersect(genes_all_metabolism, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_metabolism) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_metabolism))
  
  Cardio$Metabolism_Score_all1 <- NA
  
  } else {
  
  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_metabolism),
    name = "Metabolism_Score_all"
  )
  }

# ---- Genes within immune category ----
  genes_tgf_nc_immune <- unique(as.character(score_tgf_nc_immune$x))
  genes_mettgf_tgf_immune <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_immune$x))
  genes_met_nc_immune <- unique(as.character(score_met_nc_immune$x))

  genes_all_immune <- unique(c(
  genes_met_nc_immune,
  genes_mettgf_tgf_immune,
  genes_tgf_nc_immune
  ))

  genes_intersect_list_immune <- intersect(genes_all_immune, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_immune) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_immune))
  
  Cardio$Immune_Score_all1 <- NA
  
  } else {
  
  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_immune),
    name = "Immune_Score_all"
  )
  }
## Too few genes for module score: 4

  genes_mettgf_tgf_cellcycle,
  genes_tgf_nc_cellcycle
  ))

  genes_intersect_list_cellcycle <- intersect(genes_all_cellcycle, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_cellcycle) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_cellcycle))
  
  Cardio$Cell_cycle_Score_all1 <- NA

  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_cellcycle),
    name = "Cell_cycle_Score_all"
  )

## Too few genes for module score: 1
  # ---- Genes within signaling category ----
  genes_tgf_nc_signaling <- unique(as.character(score_tgf_nc_signaling$x))
  genes_mettgf_tgf_signaling <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_signaling$x))

  genes_tgf_nc_signaling

  # ---- Genes within development category ----
  genes_tgf_nc_development <- unique(as.character(score_tgf_nc_development$x))
  genes_mettgf_tgf_development <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_development$x))
  genes_met_nc_development <- unique(as.character(score_met_nc_development$x))

  genes_all_development <- unique(c(
  genes_met_nc_development,
  genes_mettgf_tgf_development,
  genes_tgf_nc_development
  ))

  genes_intersect_list_development <- intersect(genes_all_development, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_development) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_development))
  
  Cardio$Development_Score_all1 <- NA
  
  } else {
  
  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_development),
    name = "Development_Score_all"
  )
  }

  # ---- Genes within cell death category ----
  genes_tgf_nc_celldeath <- unique(as.character(score_tgf_nc_celldeath$x))
  genes_mettgf_tgf_celldeath <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_celldeath$x))
  genes_met_nc_celldeath <- unique(as.character(score_met_nc_celldeath$x))

  genes_all_celldeath <- unique(c(
  genes_met_nc_celldeath,
  genes_mettgf_tgf_celldeath,
  genes_tgf_nc_celldeath
  ))

  genes_intersect_list_celldeath <- intersect(genes_all_celldeath, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_celldeath) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_celldeath))
  
  Cardio$Cell_death_Score_all1 <- NA
  
  } else {
  
  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_celldeath),
    name = "Cell_death_Score_all"
  )
  }
## Too few genes for module score: 1

2.1 Visualizing Metabolic Scores

VlnPlot(Cardio, features = "Metabolism_Score_all1", group.by = "condition")

p <- VlnPlot(Cardio, features = "Metabolism_Score_all1", group.by = "condition")
ggsave(
  filename = "Metabolism_Score_all1.jpg",
  plot = p,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

2.2 Visualizing Migration Scores

VlnPlot(Cardio, features = "Migration_Score_all1", group.by = "condition")

p <- VlnPlot(Cardio, features = "Migration_Score_all1", group.by = "condition")
ggsave(
  filename = "Migration_Score_all1.jpg",
  plot = p,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

2.3 Visualizing Immune Scores

if ("Immune_Score_all1" %in% colnames(Cardio@meta.data) &&
    !all(is.na(Cardio$Immune_Score_all1))) {
  
  p1 <- VlnPlot(
    Cardio,
    features = "Immune_Score_all1",
    group.by = "condition"
  )
  
} else {
  
  p1 <- ggplot() +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
      label = "Genes set to small to generate module score (lower than 5)",
      size = 6
    ) +
    theme_void()
}
p1

ggsave(
  filename = "Immune_Score_all1.jpg",
  plot = p1,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

} else {

}

3 Computing module scores for each biological category only for MET_TGF vs TGF comparison

  # ---- Genes within metabolic category ----
  genes_mettgf_tgf_metabolism <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_metabolism$x))

  genes_intersect_list_metabolism_mettgf_tgf <- intersect(genes_mettgf_tgf_metabolism, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_metabolism_mettgf_tgf) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_metabolism_mettgf_tgf))
  
  Cardio$Metabolism_Score_mettgf_tgf1 <- NA
  
  } else {
  
  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_metabolism_mettgf_tgf),
    name = "Metabolism_Score_mettgf_tgf"
  )
  }
## Too few genes for module score: 4
# ---- Genes within immune category ----
  genes_mettgf_tgf_immune <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_immune$x))

  genes_intersect_list_immune_mettgf_tgf <- intersect(genes_mettgf_tgf_immune, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_immune_mettgf_tgf) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_immune_mettgf_tgf))
  
  Cardio$Immune_Score_mettgf_tgf1 <- NA
  
  } else {
  
  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_immune_mettgf_tgf),
    name = "Immune_Score_mettgf_tgf"
  )
  }
## Too few genes for module score: 4
  # ---- Genes within migration category ----
  genes_mettgf_tgf_migration <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_migration$x))

  genes_intersect_list_migration_mettgf_tgf <- intersect(genes_mettgf_tgf_migration, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_migration_mettgf_tgf) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_migration_mettgf_tgf))
  
  Cardio$Migration_Score_mettgf_tgf1 <- NA
  
  } else {
  
  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_migration_mettgf_tgf),
    name = "Migration_Score_mettgf_tgf"
  )
  }

  # ---- Genes within cell cycle category ----
  genes_mettgf_tgf_cellcycle <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_cellcycle$x))

  genes_intersect_list_cellcycle_mettgf_tgf <- intersect(genes_mettgf_tgf_cellcycle, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_cellcycle_mettgf_tgf) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_cellcycle_mettgf_tgf))
  
  Cardio$Cell_cycle_Score_mettgf_tgf1 <- NA
  
  } else {
  
  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_cellcycle_mettgf_tgf),
    name = "Cell_cycle_Score_mettgf_tgf"
  )
  }
## Too few genes for module score: 0
  # ---- Genes within signaling category ----
  genes_mettgf_tgf_signaling <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_signaling$x))

  genes_intersect_list_signaling_mettgf_tgf <- intersect(genes_mettgf_tgf_signaling, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_signaling_mettgf_tgf) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_signaling_mettgf_tgf))
  
  Cardio$Signaling_Score_mettgf_tgf1 <- NA
  
  } else {
  
  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_signaling_mettgf_tgf),
    name = "Signaling_Score_mettgf_tgf"
  )
  }

  # ---- Genes within development category ----
  genes_mettgf_tgf_development <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_development$x))

  genes_intersect_list_development_mettgf_tgf <- intersect(genes_mettgf_tgf_development, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_development_mettgf_tgf) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_development_mettgf_tgf))
  
  Cardio$Development_Score_mettgf_tgf1 <- NA
  
  } else {
  
  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_development_mettgf_tgf),
    name = "Development_Score_mettgf_tgf"
  )
  }

  # ---- Genes within cell death category ----
  genes_mettgf_tgf_celldeath <- unique(as.character(score_mettgf_tgf_celldeath$x))

  genes_intersect_list_celldeath_mettgf_tgf <- intersect(genes_mettgf_tgf_celldeath, rownames(Cardio))

  if (length(genes_intersect_list_celldeath_mettgf_tgf) < 5) {
  message("Too few genes for module score: ", length(genes_intersect_list_celldeath_mettgf_tgf))
  
  Cardio$Cell_death_Score_mettgf_tgf1 <- NA
  
  } else {
  
  Cardio <- AddModuleScore(
    Cardio,
    features = list(genes_intersect_list_celldeath_mettgf_tgf),
    name = "Cell_death_Score_mettgf_tgf"
  )
  }
## Too few genes for module score: 0

3.1 Visualizing Metabolic Scores for mettgf_tgf comparision only

if ("Metabolism_Score_mettgf_tgf1" %in% colnames(Cardio@meta.data) &&
    !all(is.na(Cardio$Metabolism_Score_mettgf_tgf1))) {
  
  p1 <- VlnPlot(
    Cardio,
    features = "Metabolism_Score_mettgf_tgf1",
    group.by = "condition"
  )
  
} else {
  
  p1 <- ggplot() +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
      label = "Genes set to small to generate module score (lower than 5)",
      size = 6
    ) +
    theme_void()
}
p1

ggsave(
  filename = "Metabolism_Score_mettgf_tgf1.jpg",
  plot = p1,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

VlnPlot(Cardio, features = "Migration_Score_mettgf_tgf1", group.by = "condition")

4 Computing module scores: compare all vs MET_TGF vs TGF comparison only

4.1 Visualizing Metabolic Scores compare all vs mettgf_tgf

# --- plot 1 ---
if ("Metabolism_Score_all1" %in% colnames(Cardio@meta.data) &&
    !all(is.na(Cardio$Metabolism_Score_all1)) &&
    length(unique(na.omit(Cardio$Metabolism_Score_all1))) > 1) {

  p_all <- VlnPlot(
    Cardio,
    features = "Metabolism_Score_all1",
    group.by = "condition"
  ) + ggtitle("All genes")

} else {

  p_all <- ggplot() +
    annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
             label = "No valid data (NA or no variation)",
             size = 5) +
    theme_void() +
    ggtitle("All genes")
}

# --- plot 2 ---
if ("Metabolism_Score_mettgf_tgf1" %in% colnames(Cardio@meta.data) &&
    !all(is.na(Cardio$Metabolism_Score_mettgf_tgf1)) &&
    length(unique(na.omit(Cardio$Metabolism_Score_mettgf_tgf1))) > 1) {

  p_cond <- VlnPlot(
    Cardio,
    features = "Metabolism_Score_mettgf_tgf1",
    group.by = "condition"
  ) + ggtitle("mettgf_tgf")

} else {

  p_cond <- ggplot() +
    annotate(
      "text",
      x = 0.5, y = 0.5,
      label = "Too few genes (<5)\nor no variation",
      size = 5
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    ggtitle("mettgf_tgf")
}

# --- Combined ---
p_combined <- p_all + p_cond
p_combined

ggsave(
  filename = "Metabolism_Score_combine1.jpg",
  plot = p_combined,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

4.2 Visualizing Migration Scores compare all vs mettgf_tgf

p <- VlnPlot(
  Cardio,
  features = c("Migration_Score_all1", "Migration_Score_mettgf_tgf1"),
  group.by = "condition",
  combine = TRUE
)
p

ggsave(
  filename = "Migration_Score_combine1.jpg",
  plot = p,
  width = 8,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

      label = "Too few genes (<5)\nor no variation",
      size = 5
    ) +
    theme_void() +
    ggtitle("mettgf_tgf")
}

# --- Combined ---
library(patchwork)
p_combined <- p_all + p_cond
p_combined

ggsave(
  filename = "Cell_cycle_Score_combine1.jpg",
  plot = p_combined,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)

  filename = "Cell_death_Score_combine1.jpg",
  plot = p_combined,
  width = 12,
  height = 6,
  dpi = 300
)
